creator: john.wolfe@broadcom.com
text:
open-vm-tools 11.2.0 has been released

Please see:

   https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/tag/stable-11.2.0

   https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/download/stable-11.2.0/open-vm-tools-11.2.0-16938113.tar.gz

The granular changes that have gone into the 11.2.0 release are in the ChangeLog at https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/blob/stable-11.2.0/open-vm-tools/ChangeLog

This release contains fixes for a few identified memory leaks, issues uncovered by Coverity, and issues and pull requests from https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools
